title: Shortforms
content: SSD = Student Service Division. SoD = School of Design. VC = Vice Chancellor. SPCR = Students Progression and Corporate Relations.

title: Leadership Quick Facts
content: Vice Chancellor: Dr. Rakesh Kumar Jain. Registrar: Dr. Sudhakar Shinde. Registrar email: registrar@adypu.edu.in.

title: Deans Quick Facts
content: SoD Dean: Ar. Aparna Mhetras. SSD Dean: Dr. Vijay Kulkarni. Law and Liberal Arts Dean: Dr. Sunny Thomas.

title: SSD Quick Facts
content: SSD full form: Student Service Division. SSD office location: ULC 5. SSD email: ssd@adypu.edu.in. SSD Dean: Dr. Vijay Kulkarni.

title: Hostel Contact and Fees
content: Hostel contact number: +91-8087778799. Hostel inquiry phone: +91-8087778799. Hostel fee range: ₹90,000 to ₹1,80,000 per year (excluding mess charges).

title: Placement Quick Facts
content: Placement heads: Dr. Santosh P. Rao Borde and Dr. Tushar Ram Sangole. Corporate Relations contact: bhagyashri.vyas@dypic.in.

title: Devesh Pandey - Student Council President
content: Devesh Pandey is the President of the Student Council at ADYPU. Instagram: pandeyji_2901. For queries not answered by the chatbot, contact Devesh Pandey or visit the SSD office in ULC 5.
